title: La Comédie humaine - Volume 07. Scènes de la vie de Province - Tome 03
summaries: "La Comédie humaine - Volume 07. Scènes de la vie de Province - Tome 03" by Honoré de Balzac is part of a multi-volume collection written between 1829-1848. This volume belongs to the "Scenes from Provincial Life" section of Balzac's ambitious project depicting French society during the Restoration and July Monarchy periods. The work explores the rise of capitalism, the power of money, and the dissolution of social ties through vivid characters and keen social observation, portraying aspects of life previously ignored in literature.
